headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录283篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究204篇, 开源项目37篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（70篇）。其中7%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ harry0703 /MoneyPrinterTurbo：利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.

▸ hardikpandya /stop-slop：A skill file for removing AI tells from prose

▸ affaan-m /ECC：The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research

▸ Leonxlnx /taste-skill：Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop

▸ mukul975 /Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills：754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 5 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2
text: 今日共收录283篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究204篇, 开源项目37篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（70篇）。其中7%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
